name: Unreal Void 3D
short_description: A classic game in which you have to overcome obstacles to reach the yellow point or finish line at the end of the map in a given time in the upper right corner.
detailed_description:
A NEW BETA 0.3 Unreal Void 3D IS NOW IS AVAILABLE.

This game is a classic horizontal runner-style game in which you have a keyboard to move, a mouse to rotate and you can double jump.

In this game you must have to overcome obstacles to reach the yellow point at the end of the map in a given time in the upper left corner.

You get skill modes after crossing a block of different colors or starting the level right away.

There are currently several skill modes in this game:


Fast Speed,flying,descent,
Slow speed,flying,descent,
More than one screen.
